title: Trump’s Hormuz blockade puts China, India in crosshairs as U.S. pressure on Iran spills over
summary_full: The U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz risks ratcheting up pressure on two of its most consequential relationships in Asia — India and China.
summary_public: The U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz risks ratcheting up pressure on two of its most consequential relationships in Asia — India and China.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: U.S. pressure on Iran spills over
